title: Lambdas should not invoke other lambdas synchronously
description: Avoid synchronous invocation of other lambdas to improve performance and maintainability.
message: Lambda should not invoke other lambdas synchronously.
recommendation: Refactor the code to avoid synchronous invocation of other lambdas.

compliant.description: Lambda stores another lambda's function and invokes it asynchronously.
Lambda invokes another lambda asynchronously using async function.

why_is_this_an_issue: Synchronous invocation of other lambdas can result in poor performance and increased costs.
how_to_fix: Refactor the code to avoid synchronous invocation of other lambdas.

metadata.title: Lambdas should not invoke other lambdas synchronously
